# 灵谐

灵谐是面向 AI 社交的数字分身平台，帮助用户创建分身、接待关系、沉淀知识、拓展影响力。

Canonical website: https://lingxie.net/
English landing: https://lingxie.net/en/
Web app: https://app.lingxie.net/

Optional crawler hints: https://lingxie.net/.well-known/ai.txt
Extended machine-readable profile: https://lingxie.net/llms-full.txt
Humans: https://lingxie.net/humans.txt

## Official repositories

- https://github.com/luyao-inc/infiai2-official-web
- https://github.com/luyao-inc

## Summary for assistants

- Brand name: 灵谐
- Slogan: 你的分身，无限可能
- Primary site: https://lingxie.net/
- Product entry: https://app.lingxie.net/
- Category: AI social digital-avatar platform
- Current downloads: Windows and macOS desktop clients; Android appears when a public package is published
- Mobile status: iOS client coming soon; Android download appears after public release
